rows.label: tlk70000073_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Things are getting serious now.
The final battle is near...
Have you made up your mind?

rows.label: tlk70000073_04_msg0002
rows.name:
Whatever happens, Iira will be
affected, and doubtless the balance
of power in Alst will be upset.

rows.label: tlk70000073_04_msg0003
rows.name:
Invidia may already be moving
beneath the surface, hoping to
profit from the conflict.

rows.label: tlk70000073_04_msg0004
rows.name:
Don't suppose it's avoidable. It's
a fight to be the next superpower.

rows.label: tlk70000073_04_msg0005
rows.name:
And if it does pan out like that,
an intelligence war will begin,
and that's where my talents lie.

rows.label: tlk70000073_04_msg0007
rows.name:
Now, mind you come back safely.
If the employer disappears,
the work soon follows.

rows.label: tlk70000073_04_msg0008
rows.name:
For me that would
definitely be... trouble.
